title: gymnostichum hystrix
intro: Gymnostichum hystrix, also known as the hair-ferns or the hair fern, is a species of fern that is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The Gymnostichum hystrix has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating fever, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Gymnostichum hystrix are typically made by drying and processing the fronds, which can be used as teas, tinctures, or infusions.
